basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Project Nurse II Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS) has published the Project Nurse II Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Project Nurse II position on a project basis. Candidates up to 30 years of age holding a Diploma qualification are eligible to apply via email through the official AIIMS website. The application process is open until 23 July 2026, and candidates can easily access the official notification PDF and email application details below.

qualification.details: Project Nurse-II: Minimum Second Class or equivalent CGPA three-year General Nursing and Midwife (GNM course). Experience in field of emergency care and research activities is desirable.

salary_details.details: Project Nurse II: Approx. Rs. 25,400/=(including HRA) monthly for first year and then, as admissible (subject to changes as per ICMR)

selection_process: Shortlisted candidates will be invited for interview through e-mail. Immediate Joining is requested from the selected candidate.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Project Nurse-II Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 23-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download AIIMS Project Nurse II Job 2026 Notification PDF

AIIMS Project Nurse II Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the AIIMS Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download AIIMS Project Nurse II Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Project Nurse-II Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 23-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Project Nurse II Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Project Nurse-II recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the AIIMS Project Nurse-II recruitment is 23-07-2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Nurse-II post?
faq.answer: The essential qualification is a Minimum Second Class or equivalent CGPA in a three-year General Nursing and Midwife (GNM) course. Experience in emergency care and research is desirable.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Nurse-II position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Nurse-II post is 30 years. There is no minimum age specified in the provided data.

faq.question: Q4. How much is the salary for the Project Nurse-II post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Project Nurse-II post is approximately Rs. 25,400 per month, which includes HRA. This is for the first year and subject to changes as per ICMR guidelines.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is via email. Candidates need to send their bio-data and relevant documents to the designated email address.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Project Nurse-II post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Nurse-II post at AIIMS, New Delhi.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Nurse-II role?
faq.answer: Candidates will be shortlisted and then invited for an interview via email. Immediate joining is expected from the selected candidate.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: This is a project-based job, meaning the employment is linked to the duration and funding of the specific research project.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the AIIMS located for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for AIIMS, New Delhi, located at New Delhi, Delhi, with the pincode 110029.
